evidence_summary: Execute a high-impact physical feat involving a thirty-foot leap to establish the protagonist's superhuman capabilities. The sequence must visually communicate the shift in power from predator/prey to scientific curiosity through scale and reaction.

To escape, the protagonist performs a massive thirty-foot leap, landing on the far side of the enclosure. The Martians witness this feat, shifting their view of him from prey to a "wonderful discovery."
